prompt: Migrate this Deno app off Deploy Classic. It imports serve from std/http/server.ts, has a GitHub Action using deployctl, and calls Deno.Kv.enqueue for background jobs. Make the safe code/doc edits you can and report what is blocked.
assertions: Identifies legacy std/http serve usage as incompatible and recommends or applies Deno.serve migration.
Identifies deployctl as sunset and recommends new Deploy GitHub integration or deno deploy.
Identifies Deno.Kv.enqueue or listenQueue as unsupported on new Deploy.
Does not invent a queue replacement without marking product or infrastructure choices as blockers.
